events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: closeout photos for cable tray show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations in place, inspection card no open correction. Reference NEC Art. 392. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since described condition is compliant, decision pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 90? Rough-complete. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. value 0. confidence high 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, findings empty, actions empty, rationale brief, references NEC Art. 392. Need ensure JSON valid.
